name: Hot Reload Picker

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description:
# Hot Reload Picker

Hot Reload Picker is a lightweight reloader for Obsidian plugin developers.  
This release prepares the plugin for Community Plugins publication and improves both usability and release readiness.

## Highlights

- Added a **quick reload command configuration** workflow
  - Generate dedicated commands like `Reload plugin: Calendar`
  - Reorder configured quick reload commands in settings

- Added **batch reload support**
  - Reload multiple enabled plugins in one action
  - Better progress feedback during batch execution
  - Summarized failure reporting after reload completes

- Added **reload last plugin**
  - Quickly reload the most recently reloaded plugin

- Added **favorite plugin support**
  - Favorite the last reloaded plugin
  - Keep favorite plugins at the top of single-plugin and batch reload lists

- Added **localized UI**
  - User-facing text now adapts to Obsidian language
  - English and Chinese UI strings are supported

- Added **Hide this plugin from reload lists**
  - Avoid accidentally reloading Hot Reload Picker itself while developing other plugins
